# Garvita Dalmia — Frontend Developer

Frontend Developer specializing in React, Next.js, and TypeScript. B.Tech CSE student at Mahindra University, Hyderabad.

## Experience
- Analytics Quad4 (Feb 2026–Present): Real-time analytics dashboards, React, Recharts, Ant Design
- What Next Studio (Nov 2025–Jan 2026): Next.js, TypeScript, 100/100 PageSpeed, full SEO infrastructure

## Projects
- inFlow Financial Dashboard: React, Supabase, Zustand, TanStack Query
- Dalmia Hardware Website: Next.js, TypeScript, Google Analytics (live: dalmiahardware.com)
- Medicine Reminder PWA: React, Web Notifications API, Google Calendar API
